unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We can listen to the orchestra in the concert hall.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 在音乐厅举办音乐会(concert)的大厅(hall)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He left his car in the station car park.
There are zillions of shopping malls there.
The bus leaves from the bus station.
The police station is in the town centre.
I need to send a letter at the post office.
See some tennis at the stadium or football at the football stadium.
There's also a good sports centre too.
Visit Port Jebel Ali - the largest man-made harbour in the world.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 海港里有好多小船在避风。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Basically, every year they build a really big ice castle on the frozen lake.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 卡(ca)在石头里的石头堡垒(castle)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yellowknife doesn't have skyscrapers, but Dubai has zillions.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直插天空(sky)擦碰(scrape)云彩的大楼(skyscraper)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Visit Port Jebel Ali - the largest man-made harbour in the world.
Mum's contract is only for 18 months.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 共同(con)追踪(tract)并签署的一纸合同。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yellowknife (population about 19,000) is right at the top of Canada.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 泡泡(pop)人(u)民拉(la)扯产生人口数量(population)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He's going to work for a diamond company there.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 呆呆(dia)的人买梦(mond)幻般的钻石。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's also a really good place to see the Northern Lights.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 北方(northern)夜空里闪耀的神秘光芒(lights)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Annie's relatives want to see the castle.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 阿姨和叔叔都是我们的亲戚(relative)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There are zillions of shopping malls there.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 比百万(millions)还要多得数不清的(zillions of)。
